name: zeckon-claude-plugins
description: zeckon's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: history
plugins.description: Auto-commits each Claude turn (prompt + workspace state) to a per-project shadow git repo at ~/.claude-history/<basename>-<hash>.git, with skills to inspect and restore from the history.

plugins.name: devcontainers
plugins.description: Author, explain, lint, run, and sandbox via devcontainers (containers.dev). Optional opt-in hooks route Claude's Bash calls into the dev container and auto-rebuild on config edits.
